feature: Migrate trade notifications from Telegram to Discord Webhooks
workflow_rationale: This is a new feature that adds Discord webhook integration while preserving existing Telegram functionality. The implementation involves adding new configuration options, implementing Discord embed formatting, and refactoring the notification routing logic to support multiple platforms. All changes are contained within the notification layer.

phases.name: Configuration Layer
phases.description: Add Discord webhook URL configuration to Settings and make Telegram optional

subtasks.description: Add 4 Discord webhook URL fields to Settings class (DISCORD_WEBHOOK_US, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_KR, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_CRYPTO, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_ALERTS)

verification.command: python -c "from app.core.config import settings; assert hasattr(settings, 'discord_webhook_us'); print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Make Telegram settings optional (change telegram_token and telegram_chat_id from required to Optional[str])

verification.command: python -c "from app.core.config import Settings; s = Settings.model_construct(telegram_token=None, telegram_chat_id=None); print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Update .env.example with Discord webhook URL examples and mark Telegram as optional

verification.instructions: Verify env.example contains DISCORD_WEBHOOK_* examples and Telegram is marked as optional

phases.name: Discord Webhook Integration
phases.description: Implement Discord webhook sending and embed formatting in TradeNotifier

verification.command: python -c "from app.monitoring.trade_notifier import TradeNotifier; tn = TradeNotifier(); result = tn._format_buy_notification('BTC', '비트코인', 1, 100000, [100000], [0.001], '암호화폐'); assert isinstance(result, dict) and 'title' in result; print('OK')"

verification.command: python -c "from app.monitoring.trade_notifier import TradeNotifier; tn = TradeNotifier(); result = tn._format_cancel_notification('BTC', '비트코인', 1, '매수', '암호화폐'); assert result.get('color') == 0xFFFF00; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Convert _format_analysis_notification() to return Discord embed dict with blue color (0x0000FF)

verification.command: python -c "from app.monitoring.trade_notifier import TradeNotifier; tn = TradeNotifier(); result = tn._format_analysis_notification('BTC', '비트코인', 'buy', 85, ['이유'], '암호화폐'); assert result.get('color') == 0x0000FF; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Convert _format_automation_summary() to return Discord embed dict

verification.command: python -c "from app.monitoring.trade_notifier import TradeNotifier; tn = TradeNotifier(); result = tn._format_automation_summary(10, 10, 3, 2, 0, 45.5); assert isinstance(result, dict) and 'title' in result; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Convert _format_failure_notification() to return Discord embed dict with orange color (0xFF6600)

verification.command: python -c "from app.monitoring.trade_notifier import TradeNotifier; tn = TradeNotifier(); result = tn._format_failure_notification('AAPL', '애플', '실패사유', '해외주식'); assert result.get('color') == 0xFF6600; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Convert Toss notification methods to Discord embed format (_format_toss_buy_recommendation, _format_toss_sell_recommendation, _format_toss_price_recommendation_html)

verification.instructions: Verify all Toss notification methods return Discord embed dicts with proper formatting

phases.name: Market Type Routing
phases.description: Implement market_type-based routing logic and configure Discord webhooks

subtasks.description: Add discord_webhook_urls fields to TradeNotifier.__init__() and configure() method

verification.instructions: Verify TradeNotifier accepts discord_webhook_us, discord_webhook_kr, discord_webhook_crypto, discord_webhook_alerts in configure()

subtasks.description: Implement _get_webhook_for_market_type() helper method to route notifications to correct Discord channel

verification.command: python -c "from app.monitoring.trade_notifier import TradeNotifier; tn = TradeNotifier(); tn.configure(discord_webhook_us='url1', discord_webhook_kr='url2', discord_webhook_crypto='url3', discord_webhook_alerts='url4', enabled=True); assert tn._get_webhook_for_market_type('US') == 'url1'; assert tn._get_webhook_for_market_type('국내주식') == 'url2'; assert tn._get_webhook_for_market_type('암호화폐') == 'url3'; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Update notify_buy_order() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type

verification.instructions: Verify notify_buy_order() routes to correct Discord webhook based on market_type parameter

subtasks.description: Update notify_sell_order() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type

subtasks.notes: Updated notify_cancel_orders() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type. Changed from Telegram to Discord notification following same pattern as notify_buy_order() and notify_sell_order(). Routes to appropriate webhook: US/해외주식 → discord_webhook_us, 국내주식 → discord_webhook_kr, 암호화폐 → discord_webhook_crypto. Uses _get_webhook_for_market_type() and _send_to_discord_embed_single() methods.

subtasks.description: Update notify_analysis_complete() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type

verification.instructions: Verify notify_analysis_complete() routes to correct Discord webhook based on market_type parameter

subtasks.notes: Updated notify_analysis_complete() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type. Changed from Telegram to Discord notification following same pattern as notify_buy_order(), notify_sell_order(), and notify_cancel_orders(). Routes to appropriate webhook: US/해외주식 → discord_webhook_us, 국내주식 → discord_webhook_kr, 암호화폐 → discord_webhook_crypto. Uses _get_webhook_for_market_type() and _send_to_discord_embed_single() methods.

subtasks.description: Update notify_trade_failure() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type

verification.instructions: Verify notify_trade_failure() routes to correct Discord webhook based on market_type parameter

subtasks.notes: Updated notify_trade_failure() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type. Changed from sending to all webhooks to market-type-specific routing following same pattern as notify_buy_order(), notify_sell_order(), notify_cancel_orders(), and notify_analysis_complete(). Routes to appropriate webhook: US/해외주식 → discord_webhook_us, 국내주식 → discord_webhook_kr, 암호화폐 → discord_webhook_crypto. Uses _get_webhook_for_market_type() and _send_to_discord_embed_single() methods.

subtasks.description: Implement Telegram fallback in notification methods (try Discord first, fall back to Telegram)

verification.instructions: Verify notification methods fall back to Telegram when Discord webhooks are not configured

subtasks.notes: Implemented Telegram fallback in all market-type-based notification methods (notify_buy_order, notify_sell_order, notify_cancel_orders, notify_analysis_complete, notify_trade_failure). Each method now tries Discord first and falls back to Telegram if Discord fails or is not configured. Added 5 new Telegram formatter methods that mirror the Discord embed formatters with proper markdown formatting.

phases.name: Initialization Updates
phases.description: Update application initialization to configure Discord webhooks

subtasks.description: Update setup_monitoring() in main.py to configure Discord webhooks from settings

verification.instructions: Verify setup_monitoring() passes Discord webhook URLs to trade_notifier.configure()

subtasks.notes: Updated setup_monitoring() to configure Discord webhooks from settings. Added check for Discord webhook configuration (us, kr, crypto, alerts). Pass Discord webhook URLs to trade_notifier.configure(). Made Telegram optional - works with Discord only. Updated docstring to reflect Discord (primary) and Telegram (fallback). Improved logging to show configured notification systems. Handles case where neither Discord nor Telegram is configured.

subtasks.description: Remove dead Telegram import in screener.py (replace notifier._send_to_telegram() with public method)
subtasks.notes: Replaced private method _send_to_telegram() with public method notify_openclaw_message() in screener.py. The notify_openclaw_message() method is designed for forwarding simple markdown messages to Telegram, which is exactly what the screener needs for sending stock screening notifications. This change improves code maintainability by using the proper public API instead of accessing private methods.

phases.name: Test Updates
phases.description: Update all tests to use Discord webhook mocks instead of Telegram

subtasks.description: Update test_configure() to test Discord webhook configuration
subtasks.notes: Updated test_configure() to test Discord webhook configuration. Added test cases for all 4 Discord webhook types: US, KR, crypto, and alerts. Test now verifies that all webhook attributes are correctly set when configure() is called with Discord webhook parameters.

subtasks.description: Update test_format_buy_notification() to verify Discord embed format
subtasks.notes: Updated test_format_buy_notification() to verify Discord embed structure instead of Telegram markdown format. Test now validates embed title, color, description, and fields dictionary with correct Korean values. Syntax verified with python3 -m py_compile. Note: Test execution blocked by UV cache permission issue (system-level problem), but test logic is correct and matches Discord embed implementation.

subtasks.description: Update test_format_sell_notification() to verify Discord embed with red color
subtasks.notes: Updated test_format_sell_notification() and test_format_sell_notification_without_volumes() to verify Discord embed structure instead of Telegram markdown format. Tests now validate embed title (💰 매도 주문 접수), color (0xFF0000 red for sell), description with timestamp, and fields dictionary with correct Korean values. Also updated test_format_sell_notification_without_volumes() to verify '매도 가격대' field when prices are provided but no volumes. Note: Test execution blocked by UV cache permission issue (system-level problem), but test logic is correct and matches Discord embed implementation pattern from test_format_buy_notification().

subtasks.description: Update test_format_cancel_notification() to verify Discord embed with yellow color
subtasks.notes: Updated test_format_cancel_notification() to verify Discord embed structure instead of Telegram markdown format. Test now validates embed title (🚫 주문 취소), color (0xFFFF00 yellow for cancel), description with timestamp, and fields dictionary with correct Korean values (종목, 시장, 취소 유형, 취소 건수). Follows same pattern as test_format_buy_notification() and test_format_sell_notification(). Test verified to PASSED.

subtasks.description: Update test_format_analysis_notification() to verify Discord embed with blue color
subtasks.notes: Updated test_format_analysis_notification(), test_format_analysis_notification_hold(), and test_format_analysis_notification_sell() to verify Discord embed structure instead of Telegram markdown format. Tests now validate embed title (📊 AI 분석 완료), color (0x0000FF blue for analysis), description with timestamp, and fields dictionary with correct Korean values (종목, 시장, 판단 with emoji prefix, 신뢰도, 주요 근거 with numbered list. All tests verified to PASSED.

subtasks.description: Update all notification tests to mock Discord webhook POST instead of Telegram API
subtasks.notes:
Updated all notification tests to mock Discord webhook POST instead of Telegram API:
- Updated test_notify_buy_order_success() to configure discord_webhook_crypto and verify embeds in JSON payload
- Updated test_test_connection_success() to configure discord_webhook_crypto and verify embeds in JSON payload
- Replaced test_send_to_multiple_chats() with test_send_to_correct_webhook_by_market_type() to test market_type-based routing to correct webhooks (US/KR/Crypto)
- Updated test_notify_trade_failure_success() to configure discord_webhook_us and verify embeds in JSON payload
- Updated test_notify_sell_order_success() to configure discord_webhook_us and verify embeds in JSON payload
- Updated test_format_buy_notification_without_details() to check Discord embed dict format (title, color, fields)
- Updated test_format_automation_summary() to check Discord embed dict format with cyan color
- Updated test_format_automation_summary_with_errors() to check Discord embed dict format with error field
- Updated test_format_failure_notification() to check Discord embed dict format with orange color
- Left test_notify_openclaw_message_success() and test_notify_openclaw_message_disabled() unchanged as OpenClaw message forwarding still uses Telegram

All tests now properly mock Discord webhook POST requests with embeds payload instead of Telegram API calls with chat_id and text.

subtasks.description: Add test_market_type_routing() to verify market_type-based webhook routing
subtasks.notes: Added test_market_type_routing() to verify market_type-based webhook routing. Test directly validates the _get_webhook_for_market_type() method to ensure correct routing logic. Tests cover: US market (English 'US'), US market (Korean '해외주식'), KR market ('국내주식'), crypto market ('암호화폐'), unknown market types (returns None), and whitespace handling. All test cases verify the correct webhook URL is returned for each market type. Test follows existing patterns with pytest.mark.unit decorator and uses trade_notifier fixture.

subtasks.description: Add test_telegram_fallback() to verify Telegram fallback when Discord not configured
subtasks.notes: Added test_telegram_fallback() to verify Telegram fallback when Discord is not configured. Test configures TradeNotifier with Telegram only (no Discord webhooks), mocks httpx.AsyncClient to avoid proxy issues, calls notify_buy_order(), and verifies that Telegram API is called instead of Discord webhook. Test validates: 1) Notification succeeds via Telegram fallback, 2) Telegram API endpoint is called (not Discord webhook), 3) Message contains Telegram markdown formatting with proper escapes (\(BTC\)), 4) parse_mode is set to 'Markdown'. Test follows existing patterns with pytest.mark.unit and pytest.mark.asyncio decorators. Note: httpx.AsyncClient mock required due to SOCKS proxy environment configuration.

subtasks.description: Add test_send_to_discord() to verify Discord webhook HTTP POST behavior
subtasks.notes: Added test_send_to_discord_success() to verify Discord webhook HTTP POST behavior. Test verifies successful POST with correct URL, JSON payload with embeds, and Content-Type header. Also added test_send_to_discord_failure() to verify error handling, test_send_to_discord_disabled() to verify behavior when disabled, and test_send_to_discord_no_webhook() to verify behavior when no webhook URL provided. All tests follow existing patterns with pytest.mark.unit and pytest.mark.asyncio decorators, use patch.object for mocking HTTP client, and validate HTTP POST behavior. Tests verified to PASSED.

phases.name: Integration & Verification
phases.description: End-to-end verification of Discord webhook integration

subtasks.description: Run full test suite to ensure all tests pass with Discord integration
subtasks.notes: Successfully ran full test suite and fixed all issues. Fixed httpx.AsyncClient proxy issue by adding trust_env=False, fixed _format_automation_summary color from 0x00BFFF to 0x00FFFF, updated test_connection() to test Discord webhooks, and fixed parameter order in _send_to_discord_embed_single call. All 31 tests pass successfully.

subtasks.description: Verify application starts and initializes Discord webhooks without errors

verification.command: timeout 10 uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host localhost --port 8001 2>&1 | grep -i 'trade notifier' || true
verification.expected: Logs show Discord webhook configuration or graceful skip

subtasks.notes: Verified application starts and initializes Discord webhooks correctly. Fixed env.example Discord webhook field names to match spec (DISCORD_WEBHOOK_US, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_KR, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_CRYPTO, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_ALERTS). Tested both scenarios: 1) With Discord webhooks configured: logs show 'Trade notifier initialized: Discord (4 webhook(s)), Telegram (chat_id=xxx)', 2) Without Discord webhooks: logs show 'Trade notifier initialized: Telegram (chat_id=xxx)'. Both scenarios complete without errors.

subtasks.description: End-to-end verification: Send test notification and verify Discord webhook receives it

steps: Trigger a test notification via API or test endpoint
Verify Discord channel receives message with correct format and routing

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-3, operate on different files (main.py/screener.py vs tests)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution recommended due to tight dependencies between phases

acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass with Discord mocks
Discord webhooks receive messages with correct routing
Telegram fallback works when Discord unavailable

verification_steps.name: Integration Tests
verification_steps.command: uv run pytest tests/ -k 'trade_notifier or discord' -v

verification_steps.name: Configuration Validation
verification_steps.command: python -c "from app.core.config import settings; assert hasattr(settings, 'discord_webhook_us'); print('Config OK')"

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk change requires unit and integration test coverage. Discord webhooks are well-documented HTTP endpoints, no security scanning needed. Can be tested in development environment without staging deployment.
